title: Workflow Proof Market Note
claim: Workflow Proof Market Note Buyers increasingly expect measurable rollout proof, explicit workflow controls, and visible approval boundaries before they trust AI-assisted PM systems.
source_snippet: Workflow Proof Market Note Buyers increasingly expect measurable rollout proof, explicit workflow controls, and visible approval boundaries before they trust AI-assisted PM systems. Teams evaluating ProductOS-like wor...
implication: Teams evaluating ProductOS-like workflows still want a narrow launch lane with clear evidence rather than a broad automation promise.
unknowns: What fresh market evidence shows this problem is urgent for the target PM buyer right now?
How do current alternatives frame this workflow problem and where are their proof boundaries weaker?
followup_questions: What fresh market evidence shows this problem is urgent for the target PM buyer right now?
